title: lepidogrammitis pyriformis
intro: Lepidogrammitis pyriformis, also known as the lepidogrammitis or kidneywort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of kidney stones and other urinary tract issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including the relief of pain, reduction of swelling, and improvement of overall kidney function. Lepidogrammitis pyriformis is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, although it may also be found in capsule or tincture form, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
